subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath distinguished His sincere servants with the ornament of certitude, and exalted them through truth, and numbered them among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اعز عباده المخلصین بطراز الایقان و رفعهم بالحق و جعلهم من
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @love of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
